agents.name: LinkedIn Engagement Monitor
agents.description: Monitor LinkedIn profiles, capture who engages with their posts (likes + comments), deduplicate contacts, enrich via Speaker CLI or DataGen API, and export to CSV. Replaces tools like Trigify.

required.name: Database
required.purpose: Postgres storage for contacts, engagements, and posts

optional.name: Linkup
optional.purpose: Web search fallback when LinkedIn URL is unavailable

agents.name: Signup Enrichment
agents.description: Given a signup email, find the user's LinkedIn profile using a multi-step SOP: direct LinkedIn search, PostHog geolocation, web search with location context, and manual verification fallback.

required.name: PostHog
required.purpose: Geolocation data from user events to narrow LinkedIn search

optional.name: Linkup
optional.purpose: Web search to find LinkedIn profile by name + location

agents.name: Company One-Pager
agents.description: Given a company name and domain, research the company across web, LinkedIn, Crunchbase, G2, and job boards, then produce a structured one-pager report with overview, key facts, products, leadership, and competitive positioning.

optional.name: Linkup
optional.purpose: Web search for company news, funding, and press

optional.name: Firecrawl
optional.purpose: Scrape company website for product and pricing info

agents.name: Competitive Intelligence
agents.description: Research competitors with configurable depth (quick recon to deep analysis). Produces structured competitive profiles covering product, customers, positioning, technology, and team. Saves to organized company folders.

required.name: Database
required.purpose: Store competitive profiles and research history

optional.name: Linkup
optional.purpose: Web search for competitor news and product info

optional.name: Firecrawl
optional.purpose: Scrape competitor websites for detailed analysis

agents.name: Account-Based Marketing Intel
agents.description: Weekly ABM intelligence for target accounts. Researches hiring signals, news/PR, and company posts for a specific region, then compiles an email brief. Configurable for any target company and region.

optional.name: Gmail
optional.purpose: Send the ABM brief via email

optional.name: Linkup
optional.purpose: Web search for hiring signals and company news
